name: Miro
description: Miro — Collaborative online whiteboard platform with REST API for programmatic board and sticky note management.

seo.title: Miro — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Miro: Miro — Collaborative online whiteboard platform with REST API for programmatic board and sticky note management.

when_to_use: Programmatic sticky note creation for retrospective bots
Board automation via REST API for sprint ceremonies
Whiteboard integration into project management workflow
Embed Miro board in documentation for visual context
Team diagram sync from Miro to knowledge base

pros: Mature REST API with boards and widgets
review.verdict: The whiteboard API most teams already tolerate; fine for integrations, overkill for simple diagramming.
review.best_for: Teams embedding whiteboards into product workflows
review.not_for: Solo users or budget-sensitive design teams

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
